arts.ttl: VAR's next step to continue key improvement despite Liverpool and Arsenal decisions
arts.sum: VAR has remained a source of controversy this season in the Premier League but PGMOL suggest changes implemented have seen an improvement in using technology for 2024/25

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds suffer Anthony Gordon blow with Newcastle commitment confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool suffer a major blow in their pursuit of Anthony Gordon, who has put pen to paper on a new long-term contract at Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Liverpool are unable to stay at their usual luxury five-star German hotel for their visit to Leipzig in the Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly been forced to make alternative accommodation arrangement for their trip to Leipzig in the Champions League this week.

arts.ttl: Shaktar Donetsk chief bizarrely compares Mykhailo Mudryk to a FERRARI as he claims Chelsea 'don't know how to drive' the Ukrainian after being left out of their trip to Anfield
arts.sum: The winger arrived at Stamford Bridge in a big-money £88million deal in January 2023 but he has struggled to find consistency in west London.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues worrying Kevin De Bruyne injury update as Liverpool watch on
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne has not played for Manchester City since going off injured in the Champions League draw with Inter five weeks ago.

arts.ttl: Liverpool press conference LIVE - Diogo Jota injury news, Arne Slot updates
arts.sum: Liverpool press conference live coverage including injury and team news as Arne Slot speaks to the media ahead of the Champions League clash with RB Leipzig

arts.ttl: Premier League make referee decision after Liverpool vs Chelsea VAR chaos in Arsenal announcement
arts.sum: Liverpool news as referee for Chelsea fixture, John Brooks, learns his next set of duties following incident packed

arts.ttl: ‘They are growing on me’: Chris Sutton shares where he now thinks Liverpool will finish in the Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool are sitting pretty at the top of the Premier League right now after a 2-1 win against Chelsea at the weekend. Arne Slot’s side...

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Anthony Gordon signs lucrative Newcastle contract despite making Liverpool transfer promise
arts.sum: Newcastle and England winger Anthony Gordon is claimed to have told his team-mates that he was joining Liverpool in the summer transfer window, only to remain at St James' Park

arts.ttl: Liverpool agree record Adidas kit deal as Premier League giants ditch Nike
arts.sum: Adidas are making big moves and Liverpool will join Manchester United in signing a long-term deal with the sports brand
